Metadata.title: RS Studio | AI-First Development Studio
Metadata.description: AI-first development studio — from idea to launch. Landing pages, SaaS apps, and custom AI solutions.

Index.heroHeading:
AI-first development studio.
A new way to build systems.
Index.heroSubheading: From idea to launch — landing pages, SaaS apps, and AI agents. Faster, smarter, more affordable.
Index.aboutEntityDescription: RS Studio is an AI-first development studio specializing in full-stack web applications, SaaS platforms, and custom AI solutions. We build complete products — from concept through design and development to launch. By combining cutting-edge AI technologies with software engineering, we deliver high-quality solutions faster and at competitive prices.

Why.title: Why RS Studio?
Why.subtitle: A different approach to development — faster, smarter, and cost-effective.
Why.speed_desc: AI-accelerated development process — projects that take months are completed in weeks.
Why.cost_desc: High engineering efficiency that translates to significant savings compared to traditional agencies.
Why.product_desc: From idea to launch — strategy, design, development, and support all in one place.
Why.ai_desc: AI isn't bolted on — it's part of the architecture. Systems built around artificial intelligence.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: End-to-end solutions — from a landing page to a full system.
Services.landing_desc: Marketing site for a product or business. Modern design, built-in SEO, high performance.
Services.saas_desc: Full product: authentication, dashboard, payments, user management, and more.
Services.aaas_desc: AI-powered automation tool or agent tailored to your business needs.
Services.q1: How long does a project take?
Services.a1: Depends on the project type — landing page 1-2 weeks, SaaS app 4-8 weeks, custom AI system 3-6 weeks.
Services.q2: What technologies do you work with?
Services.a2: Next.js, React, Node.js, Python — plus AI integration with OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, and more.
Services.a3: Yes, we offer support and maintenance packages for every project.

Agents.title: AI Agents
Agents.subtitle: 10 smart agent types to supercharge your business.
Agents.support_desc: 24/7 customer Q&A trained on your company docs.
Agents.lead_desc: Engages and qualifies website visitors by potential.
Agents.onboarding_desc: Guides new users through the setup process.
Agents.document_desc: Extracts data from PDFs, invoices, and contracts.
Agents.email_desc: Drafts and sends replies based on rules and context.
Agents.knowledge_desc: Answers internal team questions from company docs.
Agents.content_desc: Blog posts, social content, and copy — on brand.
Agents.data_desc: Answers business questions from your connected data.
Agents.voice_desc: Handles phone and WhatsApp calls via AI.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: A simple, transparent process — from discovery to launch.
HowItWorks.step1_desc: Free consultation to understand your needs, goals, and vision.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: Accelerated development with regular updates, design, and testing.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: Project goes live with full support and quality assurance.

TechStack.title: Tech Stack
TechStack.subtitle: The most advanced tools in the industry.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Clear packages, no surprises.
Pricing.landing_features: Custom design,High performance,Built-in SEO,Single page with animations,Hebrew & English support
Pricing.saas_features: Auth & user management,Custom dashboard,Payment integration,Data management,Full API
Pricing.aaas_features: Custom AI agent,Business automation,Integration with existing tools,Training & onboarding,Ongoing support
